summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Texas BHA website updates including navbar reorder, team page, content restructuring, and admin functionality

backend_issues.notes: All backend APIs working perfectly at 100% success rate

passed_tests: Navbar dropdown order: Consulting → Policy → Expansion → Outreach → Philanthropy
Team link present in main navigation
Team page loads with Executive Board (4 members) and Committee Leads (5 members)
Homepage about section contains official BHA intro text about Healthcare Innovation Initiative minor
Consulting page shows ongoing projects first after team photo section
Outreach page has clickable Google Calendar link (not embed)
Newsletter page restructured: featured article → signup form → archive
Opportunities page restructured: Healthcare minor → internships → philanthropy
Admin panel has Team tab with 9 team members manageable
Contact form fully functional with all fields
All external links opening in new tabs correctly
